All-in-one estimator

Platform highlights

Built for premium construction estimating

From site planning to material takeoff, ContractorsCalc brings clarity and confidence to every stage of your project.

Unified estimating

All major calculator workflows in one polished platform so your team can work faster without switching tools.

Field-ready design

Clean, mobile-first interfaces that keep calculations accessible on the jobsite and in the office.

Accurate outputs

Engineered for precision with clear material breakdowns and result summaries you can trust.

Fast decision support

Quick results, smooth interactions, and intuitive navigation help teams move from estimate to action.

Core tools

High-quality calculators for every construction task

Access fast, practical tools that help you estimate materials, manage costs, and plan your next build with clarity.

Cement Calculator

Estimate cement, sand & aggregate for slabs and foundations.

Concrete Calculator

Calculate concrete volume and material needs for pours and slabs.

Bricks Calculator

Estimate brick counts and mortar allowance for walls and structures.

Paint Calculator

Quickly plan paint volume for walls, ceilings, and trim.

Tile Calculator

Determine tile counts and material needs for floors and walls.

Labour Cost Calculator

Calculate crew cost using workers, hours, rate, and days.

HVAC Calculator

Estimate BTU and load requirements for room cooling.

Roofing Calculator

Calculate roof area and material needs for pitched or flat roofs.

Flooring Calculator

Estimate flooring material requirements and coverage quickly.

AI assistance

Intelligent support for construction queries

Ask the built-in assistant for quick guidance on materials, labour, budgets, and planning.

Ask about cement, concrete, bricks, paint, tiles, labour, HVAC, roofing, or flooring.
AI integration is ready for OpenAI or custom backend setup.
Why ContractorsCalc

A high-end construction estimating platform built for modern projects.

Our platform delivers precise calculators, intuitive controls, and a responsive interface so teams can estimate faster without sacrificing accuracy.

Professional clarity

Clean layouts and readable analytics make planning easier for contractors and managers.

Responsive performance

Fast-loading pages and mobile-first design keep your workflow moving on any device.

Scalable toolkit

All key estimating tools are consolidated in one premium dashboard.

Premium workflow
